common.activePermissionNotif: Enable Android permissions to unlock full protection features. Without them, Scrolfy cannot fully help you block distractions.

focus.appsSubtitle: Select the apps that distract you the most.
focus.freeLimitBody: On the free plan, you can monitor up to 3 apps.
focus.notInstalledBody: {{name}} does not seem to be installed on this device (scheme: {{scheme}}).
focus.customHint: A URL scheme (e.g. tg://) is required to verify the app.
focus.schemeRequiredBody: Enter a valid URL scheme to verify the app installation.
focus.customInvalidScheme: This scheme is invalid — the app may not be installed.
focus.duplicateBody: You already have an app named “{{name}}”. Please choose another name.
focus.accessibilityBody: Enable Scrolfy in Accessibility settings. This is required for blocking apps.
focus.shieldBody: App blocking requires Screen Time (iOS) or Accessibility / parental control (Android). Open settings to enable permissions.
focus.enableNotificationsBody: Enable notifications in settings to continue.
focus.enableAndroidPermissionsBody: Enable Accessibility and Overlay in Android settings for real-time blocking.
focus.requiredSelectionBody: Select at least one app to block.

mastery.title: Your progress
mastery.subtitle: Every action counts. You're improving every day.
mastery.saved: {{minutes}} min of scrolling turned into learning
mastery.streakHint: Keep going to unlock the Focus Master badge
mastery.analysisBody: {{answered}} quizzes · {{pct}}% success · your learning is improving

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, language, theme, and protection
settings.permissionsHint: Screen Time / Accessibility required for real blocking
settings.resetDataConfirm: This will delete your app data permanently.
settings.privacyPolicyBody: Scrolfy stores your progress locally and only keeps the minimum data required to provide blocking and challenge features.
settings.termsBody: By using Scrolfy, you agree to use blocking and challenge features responsibly and in compliance with your local regulations.

session.title: Interception
session.limitReached: You have reached your scroll limit.
session.limitReachedMotivation: Refocus now and invest this time into your goals.

motivation.correct1: Excellent choice. Your attention is becoming your advantage.
motivation.correct2: Great work. You are training your brain to stay focused.
motivation.correct3: Keep going. Your discipline is paying off.
motivation.retry1: This is one step. Reset and move forward.
motivation.retry2: Your focus gets stronger one question at a time.

session.premiumTease: Premium adds unlock delay and behavioral penalty system.
session.doneBody: You have answered all available questions for now.

slide1.title: Scroll smarter.
slide1.description: Every minute you scroll is time you lose. Take control back.

slide2.title: The smart shield
slide2.description: Scrolfy blocks your impulses and turns them into learning moments.

slide3.title: Learn to unlock
slide3.description: One challenge per day to earn your entertainment time.

onboarding.socialProof: Users save up to 2 hours per day with Scrolfy.

setup.profileSubhead: Build your focus profile in seconds.

subject.title: Subject
subject.invalidBody: Please select a subject from suggestions.

paywall.title: Unlock your full potential
paywall.subtitle: Go beyond limits and take full control of your attention

premiumModal.title: Available in Premium
premiumModal.body: Unlock unlimited apps, strict mode, schedule blocking, unlock delay and full control.

subscriptionLock.title: Feature locked
subscriptionLock.body: This feature is part of Scrolfy Premium. Upgrade to unlock it.
